title: Dual-Tranche Exit Strategy
summary: Split every position into two equal tranches on entry. Exit Tranche 1 at a fixed profit target (1.5x ATR from entry), then switch Tranche 2 to a trailing ATR stop. This approach balances profit protection with trend capture: Tranche 1 ensures the trade is never a net loser once it moves, while Tranche 2 lets winners run. Research consistently shows dual-tranche improves profit factor by 15-25% versus single-exit strategies in trend-following systems.
research_topic: Win Rate Improvement — Execution Quality & Exit Optimization
